source.licenseNote: No public source repository or explicit data license was found during the 2026-06-03 import pass; GPTprice treats this as attributed third-party index data, not official or licensed open-source data.

officialPriceMd.note: Official Web status and Apple App Store regional prices from the user-provided public intelligence table were imported as high-confidence official records where applicable.

records.taxNote: Official public page does not expose a complete tax treatment for every checkout context.
